capabilities.label: Generate an image from a text prompt
capabilities.description: Text-to-image generation via AI models with per-image micropayment. Use when an agent must render a visual asset from a natural-language prompt for mockups, illustrations, or user-facing content.

capabilities.label: LLM text completion or chat
capabilities.description: Paid chat or completion APIs for frontier language models. Use when an agent needs generative text, reasoning, or tool-use responses without managing provider API keys or billing accounts.
aliases: Anthropic chat without my own key

capabilities.label: Transcribe audio to text
capabilities.description: Speech-to-text transcription via paid API. Use when an agent converts voice recordings, calls, or audio files into searchable text without hosting Whisper or STT infrastructure.

links.note: same audio family, inverse direction (audio to text vs text to audio), not substitutable

capabilities.label: Convert text to speech audio
capabilities.description: Text-to-speech synthesis via paid API. Use when an agent generates spoken audio from text for IVR, accessibility, voice assistants, or outbound voice content.

capabilities.label: Generate text embeddings for retrieval
capabilities.description: Dense vector embeddings for semantic search, clustering, and RAG pipelines. Use when an agent needs to embed sentences or documents for retrieval, ranking, or vector indexing without hosting an embedding model.

capabilities.label: Web-grounded research with citations
capabilities.description: Live web search answers with citations and grounded sources. Use when an agent needs current facts, research summaries, or cited responses instead of static model knowledge.

capabilities.label: Extract structured data from documents
capabilities.description: OCR, PDF parsing, table extraction, and schema-based field extraction from uploaded files. Use when an agent needs to turn invoices, scans, or spreadsheets into structured JSON without running a local OCR pipeline.

links.note: document_extract parses full documents into structured fields; OCR is the narrower pixels-to-text variant

capabilities.label: Track category price inflation trends

capabilities.label: Register or renew domain names
capabilities.description: Domain registration, renewal, and DNS management via micropayment. Use when an agent provisions or renews project domains and DNS without traditional registrar billing flows.

capabilities.label: Create an AI agent email inbox

aliases: set up email for my AI agent
bot email address to receive mail

capabilities.label: Send an outbound email

aliases: send one-off email no API key

same outbound-send family, differs by channel (email vs SMS)
